nasb.text: “If a man opens a pit, or digs a pit and does not cover it over, and an ox or a donkey falls into it,

esv.text: “When a man opens a pit, or when a man digs a pit and does not cover it, and an ox or a donkey falls into it,

cnv.text: “如果有人把井敞開，或是有人挖了井，而不把井口遮蓋，以致有牛或驢掉進裡面，

ccb.text: 倘若有人打开井盖或挖了井后不把井口盖好，以致有牛或驴掉进井里，
